member.name: T:Harp.StepperDriver.Device
member.summary: Generates events and processes commands for the StepperDriver device connected at the specified serial port.

member.name: M:Harp.StepperDriver.Device.CreateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the asynchronous API to configure and interface with StepperDriver devices on the specified serial port.
member.param: The name of the serial port used to communicate with the Harp device.
A which can be used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous initialization operation. The value of the parameter contains a new instance of the class.

member.name: F:Harp.StepperDriver.Device.WhoAmI
member.summary: Represents the unique identity class of the device. This field is constant.

member.name: M:Harp.StepperDriver.Device.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Harp.StepperDriver.Device.RegisterMap
member.summary: Gets a read-only mapping from address to register type.

member.name: F:Harp.StepperDriver.Device.Metadata
member.summary: Gets the contents of the metadata file describing the device registers.

member.name: T:Harp.StepperDriver.AsyncDevice
member.summary: Represents an asynchronous API to configure and interface with StepperDriver devices.

member.name: T:Harp.StepperDriver.GetDeviceMetadata
member.summary: Represents an operator that returns the contents of the metadata file describing the device registers.

member.name: M:Harp.StepperDriver.GetDeviceMetadata.Generate
member.summary: Returns an observable sequence with the contents of the metadata file describing the device registers.
member.returns: A sequence with a single object representing the contents of the metadata file.

member.name: T:Harp.StepperDriver.GroupByRegister
member.summary: Represents an operator that groups the sequence of " messages by register type.

member.name: M:Harp.StepperDriver.GroupByRegister.Process(System.IObservable{Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage})
member.summary: Groups an observable sequence of messages by register type.
member.param: The sequence of Harp device messages.
member.returns: A sequence of observable groups, each of which corresponds to a unique register.

member.name: T:Harp.StepperDriver.DeviceDataWriter
member.summary: Represents an operator that writes the sequence of " messages to the standard Harp storage format.

member.name: P:Harp.StepperDriver.DeviceDataWriter.Path
member.summary: Gets or sets the relative or absolute path on which to save the message data.

member.name: P:Harp.StepperDriver.DeviceDataWriter.Buffered
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether element writing should be buffered. If , the write commands will be queued in memory as fast as possible and will be processed by the writer in a different thread. Otherwise, writing will be done in the same thread in which notifications arrive.

member.name: P:Harp.StepperDriver.DeviceDataWriter.Overwrite
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to overwrite the output file if it already exists.

member.name: P:Harp.StepperDriver.DeviceDataWriter.FilterType
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying how the message filter will use the matching criteria.

member.name: P:Harp.StepperDriver.DeviceDataWriter.MessageType
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying the expected message type. If no value is specified, all messages will be accepted.

member.name: M:Harp.StepperDriver.DeviceDataWriter.Process(System.IObservable{Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage})
member.summary: Writes each Harp message in the sequence to the specified binary file, and the contents of the device metadata file to a separate text file.
member.param: The sequence of messages to write to the file.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing the messages to a raw binary file, and the contents of the device metadata file to a separate text file.

member.name: M:Harp.StepperDriver.DeviceDataWriter.Process(System.IObservable{System.Reactive.Linq.IGroupedObservable{System.Int32,Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage}})
member.summary: Writes each Harp message in the sequence of observable groups to the corresponding binary file, where the name of each file is generated from the common group register address. The contents of the device metadata file are written to a separate text file.
member.param: A sequence of observable groups, each of which corresponds to a unique register address.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing the Harp messages in each group to the corresponding file, and the contents of the device metadata file to a separate text file.

member.name: M:Harp.StepperDriver.DeviceDataWriter.Process(System.IObservable{System.Reactive.Linq.IGroupedObservable{System.Type,Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage}})
member.summary: Writes each Harp message in the sequence of observable groups to the corresponding binary file, where the name of each file is generated from the common group register name. The contents of the device metadata file are written to a separate text file.
member.param: A sequence of observable groups, each of which corresponds to a unique register type.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing the Harp messages in each group to the corresponding file, and the contents of the device metadata file to a separate text file.

member.name: T:Harp.StepperDriver.EnableDriver
member.summary: Represents a register that enables the driver for a specific motor. If the driver is already enabled, the driver remains enabled.

member.name: F:Harp.StepperDriver.EnableDriver.Address
member.summary: Represents the address of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: F:Harp.StepperDriver.EnableDriver.RegisterType
member.summary: Represents the payload type of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: F:Harp.StepperDriver.EnableDriver.RegisterLength
member.summary: Represents the length of the register. This field is constant.

member.name: M:Harp.StepperDriver.EnableDriver.GetPayload(Bonsai.Harp.HarpMessage)
member.summary: Returns the payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the message payload.

member.summary: Returns the timestamped payload data for register messages.
member.param: A object representing the register message.
member.returns: A value representing the timestamped message payload.

member.name: M:Harp.StepperDriver.EnableDriver.FromPayload(Bonsai.Harp.MessageType,Harp.StepperDriver.StepperMotors)
member.summary: Returns a Harp message for the register.

The value to be stored in the message payload.
member.returns: A object for the register with the specified message type and payload.

member.summary: Returns a timestamped Harp message for the register.
member.param: The timestamp of the message payload, in seconds.

The value to be stored in the message payload.
member.returns: A object for the register with the specified message type, timestamp, and payload.

member.name: T:Harp.StepperDriver.CreateMaxPositionPayload
member.summary: Represents an operator that creates a message payload that defines the limit of the accumulated steps for the positive movement of all motors. The device will not let the motors move further than this value. A value equal to 0 will disable the limits.
